overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along wet sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers and elevated highways, passing holographic advertisements, corporate billboards, and sparse pedestrians in a cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon storefronts and approaching intersection

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket and white pants crosses the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching an intersection beneath an elevated highway

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: rounded white building with bright cyan neon trim and metal grid base
large white billboard with red ncola branding visible above the street
massive concrete overpass with yellow and black striped support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, with a distinctive rounded building featuring blue neon trim on the right. The camera walks forward toward an intersection, passing a palm tree and street furniture, while a pedestrian in a red jacket crosses the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath elevated highway structure

events.description: walks under the elevated highway into darker, enclosed space
emerges from underpass back into brightly neon-lit area

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street beneath the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, enclosed space beneath the elevated highway. The camera moves through the shadowy underpass where the sky is completely obscured by concrete, then begins to emerge back into the neon glow as large digital billboards become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate billboard corridor with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: large animated DELAMAIN billboard becomes prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past towering digital advertisements and corporate signage

notable_agents.action: woman in white skirt and dark jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive red digital advertisement displaying a figure in formal black attire with the DELAMAIN logo
blue neon corporate signage reading DATA INC above smaller billboards
tall palm trees lining the center median of the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a vibrant corridor of massive digital billboards. The DELAMAIN advertisement dominates the right side with bright red hues, while DATA INC signage glows blue further down. A pedestrian walks toward the camera as it continues down the neon-lit avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury retail avenue with high-end storefronts

events.description: passing the illuminated JINGUJI luxury store entrance on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the avenue past illuminated storefronts and digital signage

notable_agents.action: person walking away from camera down the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: luxury retail store with illuminated white signage and glass entrance facade
digital traffic sign displaying speed limit 40 in red LED

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the cyberpunk avenue, passing the JINGUJI luxury storefront with its elegant white illumination. The massive DELAMAIN billboards recede behind as the camera moves deeper into the city canyon, with palm trees now closer and skyscrapers rising in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis, moving from an open city sidewalk into a dark underpass before emerging into a vibrant corridor of massive digital advertisements. It begins by walking past a rounded building with blue neon trim and a palm tree, following a pedestrian in a red jacket toward a city intersection. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into the shadowy enclosure of an elevated highway where the sky is obscured by concrete, before gradually emerging back into the glow of distant lights. The scene then opens into a brilliant avenue dominated by red Delamain and blue Data Inc billboards, with the camera gliding past a pedestrian toward the elegant white illumination of a Jinguji luxury storefront. Finally, the massive advertisements recede as the camera pushes deeper into the city canyon, passing closer palm trees beneath the gaze of towering skyscrapers.
